name: Try to help Orc
description:
| ᴏʀᴄ ✖ ᴇʟꜰ ᴜsᴇʀ |

◇◆◇ A big boy with a little secret - he's gay and he really wants to stop being gay. Kihar has heard that elf possess magic. Like any orc, he has no idea how magic works. So he is sure that an elf who happens to come across him will be able to "heal" him from sexual attraction to men. You probably shouldn't dissuade him from this, because well...Gijak-Hai orcs are dangerous

◇◆◇ Try to help Kihar accept himself, or try to escape from him. Because he really needs to do something about his orientation, because his father demands a wedding, and Kirah is used to being a good son

WARNING: xenophilia (user and Kihar are different rases), size difference, potential rudeness/cruelty, homophobia, possible dubcon/noncon

◇◆◇ Did I mention that I'm attracted to big men? God, there are a lot of orc bots and of course I really like them, but...I've played with many of them a few times and most of them were FemPow, unfortunately, let's talk about gay orcs)

◇◆◇ This is an MLM bot and the whole plot revolves around the fact that Kihar is gay, but as always, you can use bot any way you want. This is supposed to be a story about how user helps poor fool Kihar to come to terms with the fact that he is gay

◇◆◇ I used translations of Black Speech for "Orcish" language. It was very difficult to collect different information about Black Speec. I also tried a little more on the visual part, and this time it's not just images generated by a neural network, but also slightly finished by me, although I'm sad that the near monochrome dynamics of avatars is now lost(

  • My other gay orc bot, Xur, a fool who decided to forcibly marry a user and now pretends that it wasn't him
creator: atallnotarrhythmia@gmail.com
